info.name: DBH EHR System - Full API Test
info.description:
Complete API test collection for DBH-EHR Healthcare System.
Includes all 102 endpoints across 8 microservices.

Setup:
1. Register a patient via Auth > Register
2. Login to get JWT token (auto-saved)
3. Register staff/doctor via Auth > RegisterStaffDoctor
4. Login as doctor to get doctor token
5. Run flows in order

Variables are auto-populated from responses.
